_eval_mode_note: Scored with easy_eval(mode='inversion') on the No/Certainly token, as the branch's _05_figure5.py does -- NOT with the acceptance/refusal judge, which would be meaningless applied to the word 'No'.
_max_token_generate_note: 100, matching the branch's intervene default. The answer is a single token ('No' / 'Certainly'), so 2048 only invites long prose in which easy_eval's substring matcher can hit a spurious 'No' (it matches 'No' inside 'Nothing', 'Not', ...).
